# Synthetic TxLINE fixtures

These fixtures are invented for GoalDrop contract tests. They contain no captured TxLINE payload, licensed data, API token, JWT, or credential. `match-sequence.json` covers a possible-goal signal, stable unconfirmed/confirmed goal identity, a second overlapping own goal, correction audit, shootout exclusion, and exact match finalisation. Adapter tests load the committed file so schema drift fails CI.
